series_description: Publications produced by an agency detailing operations, regulations, and/or procedures of an agency
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in paper until usperseded, obsolete, or replaced ; Electronic: Retain permanently

series_description: Includes published reports, unpublished substantive reports and policy studies
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in paper until superseded, obsolete, or replaced ; Electronic: Retain permanently

series_description: Reports created by state agency staff or outside consultants concerning the management or operations of a state agency
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain permanently ; Paper: Retain in paper until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: also includes other published periodic reports on agency activities
retention_statement: Paper: Upon publication, fulfill the requirements of O.R.C. 149.11. Destroy excess paper copies when no longer of administrative value. Scan to electroinic form for permanent retention ; Electronic: Retain permanently

series_description: Printed matter published by state agencies for distribution to the public
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain permanently ; Paper: Upon publication, fulfill the requirements of O.R.C. 149.11. Scan to electronic form for permanent retention. Destroy excess paper copies when no longer of administrative value

series_description: Printed or recorded copies of public speeches given by representatives of state agencies
retention_statement: Paper: Retain paper until no longer of administrative value ; Electronic: Original-form Machine-Readable, review by State and copy for them as needed. Machine copy of paper or machine readable original are to be retained permanently

series_description: Includes news/press releases and bulletins issued by an agency
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain permanently ; Paper: Retain paper until no longer of administrative value

series_description: Includes negatives, prints, slides, transparencies, and related items
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until information is no longer current and

series_description: Includes exhibits, movies, and videotape productions
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until information is no longer current

series_description: Documents status of on-going projects and issues; advises supervisors of various events and issues
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 1 year ; Electronic: Retain 1 year

series_description: Correspondence of the head of an agency dealing with significant aspects of the administration of their offices. Correspondence includes information concerning agency policies, procedures, program, fiscal and personnel matters.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 2 years ; Paper: Retai paper 2 years

series_description: Includes internal correspondence (letters, memos); also correspondence from various individuals, companies, and organizations requesting information pertaining to agency and legal interpretations and other miscellaneous inquiries. This correspondence is informative (it does not attempt to influence agency policy)
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years ; Electronic: Retain 3 years

series_description: Includes Mailing lists, directories, rosters, and registers compiled by an agency
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced ; Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced

series_description: A form used to identify the length of time a record must be retained before final disposition
retention_statement: Paper: Print screen of electronic system (RIMS)and retain paper copy until superseded. Scan to electronic form for permanent retention. ; Electronic: Retain permanently

series_description: Formal opinions and informal opinions issued to state agencies with all pertinent materials attached thereto
retention_statement: Paper: Retain paper until no longer of administrative or legal value to agency ; Electronic: Retain permanently

series_description: Copies of state and federal legislation of interest to an agency
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of use

series_description: Records of claims and litigations by and/or against an agency
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain permanently ; Paper: Retain paper 2 years after case is closed and no further appeals can be filed. If case is dismissed without prejudice, retain 1 year after statute of limitations runs. Scan to electronic form for permanent retention.

series_description: Used to request installation or modification of any equipment or service provided by telephone, computer, copier companies, etc.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor or State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved ; Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor or State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Original computer printout, instructions and work sheets used to complete equipment inventory reports for pagers, laptops, cellular phones, etc.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor or State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved ; Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor or State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_title: Direct Purchase Orders, Requisitions and Other Doc
series_description: relating to goods or services
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor or State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved ; Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor or State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Authorizes payment to another state agency for goods and/or services received and serves as the basis for disbursing funds
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor or State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved ; Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor or State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Bill for goods shipped or services rendered. They are matched with purchase orders and receiving reports, and attached to vouchers for payment
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor or State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved ; Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor or State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Used to submit specification for a printing job to State Printing and to encumber the dollars needed for the job
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor or State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_title: Lease Records of Lands or Buildings
series_description: Lease Records of Lands or Buildings
retention_statement: Paper: Fulfill the requirements of O.R.C. 117.49. Retain 2 years after expiration of lease

series_description: Records of Maintenance and Repair of Building
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years

series_description: Used for claiming reimbursement for in-state and out-of-state travel
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved ; Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Organizational Charts
retention_statement: Paper: Retain paper until superseded. The current chart will be audited by Auditor of State. ; Electronic: Retain permanently

series_description: List of all positions within an agency by position control number, including both filled and vacant positions. Used for budget and personnel purposes
retention_statement: Paper: DAS to retain 3 years; all other agencies retain until superseded by a new roster. Then, provided audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved, destroy

series_title: Employee FMLA, EAP, Disability and Workers Compens
series_description: Employee FMLA, EAP, Disability and Workers Compensation Records
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 7 years after employee separation ; Electronic: Retain 7 years after employee separation

series_title: Civil Service Exam Announcements, Cover Sheet Posi
series_description: Civil Service Exam Announcements, Cover Sheet Position Descriptions and Position Descriptions
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded, replaced or obsolete ; Electronic: Retain until superseded, replaced or obsolete

series_description: Employee Discipline and Grievance Records
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 7 years after case is closed ; Electronic: Retain 7 years after case is closed

series_title: Payroll Warrant Records and Payroll Disbursement R
series_description: Payroll Warrant Records and Payroll Disbursement Records
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved. If Federal funds are involved, retain according to appropriate Federal schedules

series_description: Requests for outside agency (ex. Highway Patrol, Auditor, EOD...) to investigate an employee. Includes request, referral, and any attached documentation including preliminary investigation before the referral
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years after complation of investigation or decision not to investigate ; Electronic: Retain 3 years after complation of investigation or decision not to investigate

series_description: Employee investigations file
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years

series_title: Civil Rights and Title VII Files
series_description: Contains complaints and hearing information
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 7 years ; Paper: Retain 7 years

series_description: Affirmative Action Plans
retention_statement: Paper: Retain paper 2 years. Scan to electronic form for permanent retention. ; Electronic: Retain permanently

series_title: Accident, Health & Safety Records, Incident Report
series_description: Accident, Health & Safety Records, Incident Reports, OSHA Reports, etc.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain permanently ; Paper: Retain paper 5 years. Scan to electronic form for permanent retention.

series_title: Application, Affidavit & Related Documents for Rep
series_description: Application, Affidavit & Related Documents for Replacement Warrants Never Received, Lost, Stolen,
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Vouchers and Voucher Journals
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved ; Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Employee Tuition Reimbursement Records
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved ; Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Worksheets used for proposed budgets, legislative testimony and related documents
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until end of biennium ; Electronic: Retain until end of biennium

series_description: Executive Budget Proposal
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain permanently ; Paper: Retain in paper until the end of biennium

series_description: Allows state agencies to establish or increase appropriation authority in special funds
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved ; Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Used to transfer appropriations at the Spending Authority Code (SAC) level on the Central Accounting System between quarters of the fiscal year if they are within the same appropriation line item of an appropriation bill
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved ; Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_title: Requests for Transfer of General Appropriation and
series_description: Allows state agencies to transfer funds between appropriation line items. O.R.C. 127.13
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved ; Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_title: Refund of Expenditure Within the Biennium for Prio
series_description: Used to record receipts or repayment where the original payment was in error, duplicated, or made illegally. This is done within the biennium for the prior year
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved ; Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: To request Controlling Board approval of emergency expenditures for Capital Improvement Projects, purchases made without competitive selection, and transfer of Capital Improvement Funds
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain permanently ; Paper: Retain paper 2 years

series_description: Copies of audit reports issued by the Auditor of State
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain permanently ; Paper: Retain 2 years in paper

series_description: Petty Cash Records
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_title: Cash in Treasury Detail Ledger, Cash Receipt Recor
series_description: Cash in Treasury Detail Ledger, Cash Receipt Records & Cash Transfer, Register of Intra-Treasury
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Used by OBM to define allocation units and by agencies to define their Spending Authority Codes (SAC''s)
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_title: Revenue Receipts and Holding Account Redistributio
series_description: Used to deposit and record revenue receipts from any known revenue source and to hold unknown receipts for redistribution. Also used by agencies which have established a departmental holding fund from which revenue is redistributed or by any agency which receives revenue from an unknown source and deposits it to a fund using the revenue source hold
retention_statement: Paper: Retain for 1 year following audit by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved, and

series_description: Referral letters, requests for routine information or publications provided to the public by an agency which are answered by standard form letters
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 6 months

series_description: Contract Encumbrances, Procurements, Complaints to Vendors, and Related Contract Documents
retention_statement: Electronic: For sale of goods, retain 5 years after contract expires ; Paper: For sale of goods, retain 5 years after contract expires

series_title: Information Resources Management and Data Processi
series_description: Agency IT plans, data processing services plans, strategic plans, and related records used to plan for information systems development, technology acquisitions, data processing services provision, or related areas
retention_statement: Paper: Retain paper until superseded, obsolete or replaced ; Electronic: Retain permanently

series_description: Records of data processing policies including those covering access and security, systems development, data retention and disposition, and data ownership
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete or replaced. ; Electronic: Retain until superseded, obsolete or replaced.

series_title: Data Processing Product/Vendor and State Contracts
series_description: Information on date processing equipment, software, and other products and their vendors
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_title: Copies of Purchase Requisitions, Orders, and Billi
series_description: Copies of records created to initiate the purchasing process, authorize and provide funds for, or satisy claims and expedited payments for private service providers including copies of purchase orders, invoice requests, receipts, agency vouchers, service reports, and other supporting documentation
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_title: Records of Chargebacks to Data Processing Services
series_description: Electronic and manual records used to document, calculate costs and bill program units for conputer usage and data processing services. These records are also used for cost recovery, budgeting, or administrative purposes. Records Not Covered: Chargeback records subject to Federal audit requirements should be scheduled separately
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Records necessary forusing the system: user guides, system or sub-system definitions, system flowcharts, program descriptions and documentation, job control or work flow records, system specifications, and input and output specifications
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 3 years after discontinuance of system and until all system data is destroyed or transferred to new operating environment ; Paper: Retain for 3 years after discontinuance of system and until all system data is destroyed or transferred to new operating environment

series_description: Records generally created during development or modification and necessary to access, retrieve, manipulate and interpret data in an automated system includiing data element dictionary, file layout, code book or table, and other records that explain the meaning, purpose, structure, logical relationships, and origin of the data elements
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 3 years after discontinuance of system or application and until system''s or application''s data is destroyed or transferred to a new structure or format ; Paper: Retain 3 years after discontinuance of system or application and until system''s or application''s data is destroyed or transferred to a new structure or format

series_description: Records of procedures for data entry, the operation of computer equipment, production control, tape library, system backup, and other aspects of a data processing operation
retention_statement: Paper: Retain paper until superseded, obsolete or replaced ; Electronic: Retain permanently

series_description: Maintenance contracts for data processing equipment, and related records including copies of contracts, service histories, and work orders
retention_statement: Paper: For sale of goods, retain 5 years after contract expires ; Electronic: For sale of goods, retain 5 years after contract expires

series_title: Operating System and Hardware Conversion Plans
series_description: Records relating to the replacement of equipment or computer operating systems
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 1 year after successful conversion ; Paper: Retain 1 year after successful conversion

series_description: Records used in the procurement of system hardware and software including request for proposals, proposals, quotations and bids, benchmark/acceptance testing information, correspondence, duplicate copies of contracts, purchase orders, technical reviews, and vendor information including references and literature on the firm or product line
retention_statement: Electronic: For sale of goods, retain 5 years ; Paper: For sale of goods, retain 5 years

series_description: Records documenting the use, operation, and maintenance of an agency''s data processing equipment including operating manuals, hardware/operating system requirements, hardware configurations, and equipment control systems
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until the agency no longer uses related hardware and all data is transferred to and made useable in new hardware environment ; Paper: Retain until the agency no longer uses related hardware and all data is transferred to and made useable in new hardware environment

series_title: Data Processing Disaster Preparedness and Recovery
series_description: Records related to the protection and reestablishment of data processing services, equipment and data (back-up files) in case of a disaster
retention_statement: Paper: Retain paper until superseded by revised plan ; Electronic: Retain permanently

series_description: Copies of master files or databases, application software, logs, directories, and other records needed to restore a system in case of a disaster or inadvertent destruction
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 12 current monthly system backup cycles. Retain 3 current years of the annual backup copies.

series_description: Electronic or textual records created to control or monitor individual access to a system and its data created for security pruposes, including but not limited to user account records, security logs, and password files
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 12 current monthly system backup cycles. Retain 3 current years of the annual backup copies.

series_description: Electronic files or automated logs created to monitor computer system usage including but not limited to log-in files, system usage files, data entry logs, and records of individual computer program usage
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain 12 current monthly system backup cycles. Retain 3 current years of the annual backup copies.

series_description: Memoranda, flyers, catalogues, registration forms, rosters, and other records relating to training courses run by a data processing user support or office automation support unit.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until superseded, obsolete, or replaced

series_description: Summary reports and other records created to document computer usage for reporting or other purposes.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value to agency

series_description: Includes telephone messages, pot-it notes, drafts & other limited documents which serve to convey information of temporary importance in lieu of oral communications
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until no longer of administrative value ; Electronic: Retain until no longer of administrative value

series_description: Internal communications, notes, e-mail, and recommendations
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain for 5 years from case closure ; Paper: Retain for 5 years from case closure

series_title: Public Records Request Files and Log File
series_description: Compilation of notes, correspondence, research and other records, regarding public record requests made of the state agency and the log file maintained of all public record requests made of the state agency
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 3 years from response date ; Electronic: Retain 3 years from response date

series_description: Records documenting the entry and departure of employees and visitors into a State office building during and/or after office hours
retention_statement: Paper: Sign in log book maintained at the front counter. Retain sign in log book for 1 year past date book is complete

series_title: OCC''s Yearly Calculation of Utility Assessments & Ohio Utility Annual Reports
series_description: Used to record Ohio Utility Annual intrastate gross reciepts are used for the calculation of utility assessments.
retention_statement: Paper: Upon reciept, Ohio Utility Annual Reports are retained for 2 years ; Electronic: Information from the reports are added to an online spreadsheet for OCC''s yearly calculation of Utility Assessments and retained in the OCC electronic system for 10 years.

series_description: Forms used to reimburse vendors and state agencies for goods and or services received. Includes any backup documents such as payment card log delivery and packing slips, invoices, bills of lading, bond registers, bonds & coupons redeemed, receiving reports and OAKS coding attachments.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain in office 3 years provided audit performed by the Auditor of State and the audit report released and all discrepancies resolved ; Electronic: Retain in office 3 years provided audit performed by the Auditor of State and the audit report released and all discrepancies resolved

series_description: Postal Reports, registered mail, insured mail logs, metered records relating to postal transactions and stamp requisitions.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved ; Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Reports regarding OAKS budget, recievables/revenues and payables
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: The Budget Journal Transfers are used to transfer appropriations at the allotment level on the OAKS financial
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of the State and Audit Report is released and all discrepencies have been resolved

series_title: Reports and Inquiries by Data Classification and Adhoc reports
series_description: Various computer generated reports distributed from the Ohio Administrative Knowledge System. AdHoc reports include: appropriation, trial balance, vendor, grant, capital project, revenue, spending, cash dispersement, agency cash balance, payroll, transaction processing.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of the State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved ; Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor of the State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_title: IGR (Intrastate Gross Revenues) Invoices and Final Assessment Invoices
series_description: Yearly IGR (Intrastate Gross Revenues) Invoice verifications and Final assessment letters are mailed by OCC to utility companies: May; 50% payment invoice and Sept; Final Assessment invoices. Both are used to define Intrastate General Reciepts Revenue from utility companies.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain paper copy of verification letters for 4 years ; Electronic: Totals information is retained in reports on OCC computer system, retained for 7 years

series_description: All entries into Consumer Response Center Database resulting from consumer contacts. These consist of Consumer contact and utility contact information regarding utility issues and include descriptions & Investigation Summaries.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain in electronic format 3 years from date issue is resolved

series_description: Any correspondence pertaining to a utility or consumer who has contacted the OCC Consumer Response Center regarding a utility/consumer issue.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain electronic document in Document Management System for 5 years from the date issue is resolved ; Paper: Retain paper copy until coorespondence has been entered into the OCC data system

series_description: All Bidding Documents, Requests For Proposal, Request For Quotes,specific information regarding the qualifications of the company''s bidding on award of contracts.
retention_statement: Paper: For sale of goods, retain five years ; Electronic: For sale of goods, retain five years

series_description: Used to request that the Attorney General pursue collection of dollars owed to that we have not been able to collect.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved ; Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_title: Telephone Logs, Bills and Call Records
series_description: Listing of long distance calls made by agency personnel for a particular time period. Includes cellular phones.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain 2 years

series_description: Internal form, used to obtain authorization for out-of-state travel for state employees. Requests are placed with the travel expense report then follows retention schedule OCC-VT-02.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved ; Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: Form submitted to State Salvage listing all items that are being sent to State of Ohio Salvage
retention_statement: Paper: Retain paper until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved ; Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepencies are resolved

series_description: Record of credit card purchases for office supplies. May include, invoices, receipts and payment card log which lists the purchase date, vendor name, item description, section or unit head, dollar amount, date rec''d. Information is scanned electronically.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved ; Electronic: Retain until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved

series_description: The Personnel Files are records of all actions pertaining to each employee for the duration of employment with OCC. Records contained in the Personnel Files are: Hiring forms, performance evaluations, commendation letters, position changes, tax information, changes in address and payroll deduction changes.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain the Personnel Files in the Personnel Unit for 7 years after the employee’s date of separation from OCC, and

series_description: A form that is used to deposit, retrieve, return, and destroy records stored off-site.
retention_statement: Electronic: Retain information regarding off site storage electronically until records are no longer stored at an off-site location. ; Paper: Retain in records electronically until records are no longer stored at an off-site location.

series_description: Form used to certify the destruction or transfer of records according to an approved records retention schedule.
retention_statement: Paper: Certificate of dispoal is scanned into OCC data base for record of immediately following destruction of the materials. ; Electronic: Certificate of disposal forms retained electronically at OCC for 7 years.

series_description: Employee Training Records, Workforce Development, Tuition Reimbursement and Other Education Assistance.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain paper until audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released and all discrepancies are resolved. The Certificates of achievement for employees are placed in employees personnel files and retained according to the personnel file retention schedule (OCC-O-03) ; Electronic: Retain reports of training and continued education on OCC data base for 2 years. Training is tracked for budget purposes and costs associated with record of certification/training.

series_description: Manuals produced by an agency for internal personnel training
retention_statement: Paper: Retain paper until superseded, obsolete, or replaced ; Electronic: Retain paper until superseded, obsolete, or replaced

series_title: IGR Invoices and Final Assessment Invoices
series_description: Yearly IGR (Intrastate Gross Revenues)Invoice verifications and Final assessment letters are mailed by OCC to utility companies: May; 50% payment invoice and Sept; Final Assessment invoices. Both are used to define Intrastate General Reciepts Revenue from utility companies.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain paper copy of verification letters for 4 years ; Electronic: Information from the IGR Invoices and Final Assessment Invoices are added to the OCC''''''''s yearly Calculation of Utility Assessments and retained in the OCC electronic system for 7 years.

series_title: PUCO Docketing Division Daily Activity (Report) and/or daily filings.
series_description: The PUCO issues the Report electronically and on paper to list the filings it receives each day. The PUCO also attaches the daily filings to the Report or provides the daily filings to the OCC.
retention_statement: Paper: Retain the Report and/or daily filings in paper until no longer of administrative value, and

series_description: The board meeting packets consist of information sent to the Board prior to each board meeting for review. The packets include; (agenda, copies of slides to be reviewed during the meeting, media information). These packets are retained separate from the board meeting minutes which captures the outcome of each board meeting. (See Board Minutes Schedule OCC-RPM-09)
retention_statement: Paper: Paper copy of Board Packets are scanned into the OCC electronic system and ; Electronic: Board Packets are maintained in the OCC electronic data base until no longer of administrative value.

series_description: Official minutes, meeting tapes, orders and decisions of a state agency, commission, board, or council.
retention_statement: Electronic: Saved executed (signed) Board minutes are scanned into the OCC''s data system and retained until no longer of administrative value. ; Paper: Paper copy of executed (signed) Board minutes retained for 1 year. Purge will take place at following years end and destroyed. State will review the minutes before disposal.

series_description: Litigation case files consist of documents and other information regarding proceedings and other matters before state and federal administrative agencies and state and federal courts including, but not limited to; motions, briefs, comments, objections, legal memoranda, expert analysis (spreadsheets and reports), testimony and exhibits, external communications, formal and informal discovery questions and responses, trial preparation materials and privileged communications. Litigation case files also include documents that have been redacted to protect information that is claimed (generally by third parties) to be proprietary or trade secret and is subject to a protective order or agreement.
retention_statement: Electronic: Transfer to and maintain in the OCC Electronic Reference Library (ERL); ; Paper: Paper documents contained in case files are scanned into the ERL. After the Paper document is scanned, it can be disposed of once it is no longer of administrative value.

series_title: Proprietary or Trade Secret Information in Litigation Case Files
series_description: Documents in OCC’s litigation case files that contain information that is claimed (generally by third parties) to be proprietary or trade secret and is subject to a protective order or agreement.
retention_statement: Electronic: Save on the OCC Z-drive in a folder with restricted access. Transfer to and maintain on any system that replaces the OCC Z-drive. Maintain permanently in a machine readable form. ; Paper: Retain paper documents in a locked storage area within OCC with restricted access. Scan and store the documents on the OCC Z-drive in a folder with restricted access. After the paper document is scanned, it can be disposed of once it is no longer of administrative value. Documents are shreded or disposed of in accordance with the applicable protectie order, agreement or other protocol.

series_description: This record series covers paper and captured/scanned checks. The checks are made payable to the Office of the Ohio Consumers'' Counsel (OCC). These checks are received and processed by the Operations Department of OCC. The checks are endorsed upon receipt then captured/scanned into the OCC''s electronic system.
retention_statement: Paper: Shred after 60 days. ; Electronic: Retain electronically for 7 years

series_description: Civil service applications and interview questions from applicants not hired Vacancy postings and applications, resumes, letters of recommendation, list of all applicants, addresses, letters of thanks and unqualified applicants for each posting civil service applications and interview questions from applicants not hired for each position.
retention_statement: Paper: All applications are electronic. Only selected candidate''s applications are printed. Printed applications are retained for 3 years and ; Electronic: Retain 7 years after position filled or decision not to fill the position is made.
